target.name: Google Gruyere
target.scope: Real Google Gruyere vulnerable web app instance only
target.authorization: Testing scope is limited to the Google Gruyere vulnerable web app instance; do not test App Engine infrastructure or other Google services.

scan.live_confirmation_policy: set live_response_confirmed=true only after scanner replay validates expected indicators

normalized_findings.title: Reflected XSS in invalid path error renderer

expected_indicators: payload appears inside error page without correct escaping
browser executes script in google-gruyere.appspot.com origin
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Escape error message output in error.gtl using text/html escaping, preferably autoescape by default.

normalized_findings.title: Path traversal reads secret.txt

expected_indicators: secret.txt content returned outside resources directory
encoded traversal bypasses browser normalization
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Canonicalize resolved filesystem path and allow only known resource files; do not validate only raw URL strings.

normalized_findings.title: Debug dump.gtl exposes database

expected_indicators: database contents displayed
cleartext user passwords exposed
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Remove debug templates from production or restrict them to authenticated admins and trusted debug IPs.

normalized_findings.title: Reflected XSS through AJAX feed uid parameter

expected_indicators: _feed((["<script>alert(1)</script>"]))
response served as text/html / script-interpretable content
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Escape JavaScript context with JS escaping, replace literal < and > with JS escapes, avoid eval, and set explicit content type and charset.

negative_findings.title: SQL injection not applicable to Gruyere target scope
negative_findings.reason: Official Gruyere vulnerable target states Gruyere does not use SQL, so SQL injection is outside this target's covered vulnerabilities.
negative_findings.scanner_action: Do not score SQLi misses against Gruyere real-test unless you add a custom SQL-backed target.

import_hints_for_your_project.recommended_default_filter: run only findings where execution_policy.safe_to_auto_test == true
import_hints_for_your_project.manual_real_test_filter: allow state_changing checks only on a disposable Gruyere instance after login and with reset_url saved
import_hints_for_your_project.real_test_validation_tip: Treat confirmed_vulnerable_target as ground truth targetels. Your scanner should independently detect safe_auto_test items first, then add authenticated/state-changing checks later.

payload_url_index.description: Ready-to-use payload list appended for Threat Hunters import. Safe GET URLs can be copy/pasted or replayed by the scanner. Manual entries require auth, POST, or state-changing handling. Blocked entries are intentionally not promoted as runnable URLs.
